# Lunexo Media

> Digital marketing agency offering web development, SEO, Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and AI automation services.

## Services
- Website Design: Custom, conversion-focused websites for businesses of all sizes
- SEO: Search engine optimization to rank higher on Google
- Google & Facebook Ads: Paid advertising management to maximize ROI
- AI Automation: Business process automation with AI chatbots, voice agents, and workflow automation
- Email Automation: Automated email marketing campaigns

## About
Lunexo Media is a full-service digital marketing agency helping businesses launch faster and grow smarter. We specialize in SEO, paid ads, web design, and AI automations — everything your business needs to thrive online.

## Founder
Founded by Farhan, serving global clients.
